ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fishing_efforts" (
  "effort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fishing effort record */,
  "effort_reduction_percentage" REAL /* Effort reduction as a percentage */,
  "average_pd_impact" REAL /* Average impact on primary species (P&D) */,
  "average_l1_impact" REAL /* Average impact on secondary species (L1) */,
  "percentage_area_unfished" REAL /* Percentage of marine area that is unfished */,
  "percentage_of_total_value" REAL /* Percentage of total catch value impacted */,
  "percentage_of_total_weight" REAL /* Percentage of total catch weight impacted */,
  "fishing_method" TEXT /* Method used for fishing (e.g., trawling, longlining) */,
  "gear_type" TEXT /* Type of fishing gear used */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Number of vessels in the fishing fleet */,
  "vessel_type" TEXT /* Type of vessel used for fishing */,
  "fishing_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the fishing effort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marine_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marine area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the marine area */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the marine area */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the area (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "protected" INTEGER /* Whether the area is protected (TRUE/FALSE) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the marine area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the marine area */,
  "boundary_coordinates" TEXT /* Boundary coordinates of the marine area (in GeoJSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status (e.g., Endangered, Least Concern) */,
  "average_size" REAL /* Average size of the species in cm */,
  "max_population_estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated maximum population size */,
  "species_category" TEXT /* Category of the species (e.g., pelagic, demersal) */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat where the species is found (e.g., coral reef, open ocean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fishing_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "effort_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated fishing effort */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "detailed_analysis" TEXT /* Detailed analysis of the fishing effort impacts */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly, annual) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_reports_effort_id FOREIGN KEY ("effort_id") REFERENCES fishing_efforts ("effort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., scientist, manager, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, export report) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., report, data, settings) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "effort_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fishing effort related to this prediction */,
  "expected_pd_impact" REAL /* Expected impact on primary species (P&D) */,
  "expected_l1_impact" REAL /* Expected impact on secondary species (L1) */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* Model used for prediction (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "prediction_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for prediction (e.g., supervised learning, unsupervised learning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_effort_id FOREIGN KEY ("effort_id") REFERENCES fishing_efforts ("effort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fishing_gear" (
  "gear_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gear */,
  "gear_type" TEXT /* Type of fishing gear (e.g., trawl, longline) */,
  "gear_description" TEXT /* Description of the gear */,
  "gear_category" TEXT /* Category of the gear (e.g., active, passive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gear_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vessel_info" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "vessel_type" TEXT /* Type of vessel (e.g., trawler, longliner) */,
  "vessel_length" REAL /* Length of the vessel in meters */,
  "vessel_draft" REAL /* Draft of the vessel in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fishing_effort_gear" (
  "effort_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fishing effort */,
  "gear_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fishing gear used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effort_id", "gear_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fishing_effort_vessel" (
  "effort_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fishing effort */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vessel used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effort_id", "vessel_id")
)
